text:
henryt4@yahoo.com writes:
> When I install another fbsd on another HD, I mount the old fbsd
> partition, and I can see old files there, but it's /usr and /var
> directories' files are gone. Is there any ways to recover those
> files. thanks

It sounds to me like /usr and /var are simply not mounted.

DES
